title: Koanophyllon jenssenii
intro: Koanophyllon jenssenii, commonly known as Jenssen's leaf or American yerba de tago, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The health benefits of Koanophyllon jenssenii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. The bioactive constituents of this plant include sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Koanophyllon jenssenii is used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to have a range of health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues.

benefits: Koanophyllon jenssenii, a plant native to the Caribbean and Central America, has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties.
